  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic rattling/clattering noise at idle",
    "Irregular cadence indicating slack in the timing drive system",
    "High risk of timing jump, valve-to-piston contact, and catastrophic engine failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the engine immediately to prevent catastrophic mechanical failure",
    "Perform a physical inspection of the timing chain, tensioner, and guides",
    "Replace the timing chain kit, including tensioner, guides, and sprockets"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a severe, rapid, and irregular metallic rattling noise characteristic of a loose timing chain slapping against its guides or the timing cover. This is typically caused by a failed hydraulic tensioner, worn guides, or a stretched timing chain. Continued operation poses a critical risk of engine destruction.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Service Manual - Engine Mechanical (Timing Chain Assembly Diagnostics)",
    "ASE Medium/Heavy Duty & Automobile Test Specifications - Engine Repair (A1)"
  ]
